# Data Model Checklist: Show Missing-Data Warnings in UI

**Purpose**: Ensure entities cover warnings, confidence, and dismissal state.
**Created**: 2026-03-11
**Feature**: `specs/026-missing-data-warnings/spec.md`

**Note**: This checklist is generated by the `/prompts:speckit.checklist` workflow.

## Core Entities

- [x] CHK-DM-001 Estimate metadata captures confidence, missing factors, and approximations.
- [x] CHK-DM-002 Warning state captures severity, message, and details.
- [x] CHK-DM-003 Dismissal state captures persistent indicator state.
